title: Login form crashes when email contains special characters
body:
## Description

The login form crashes when a user enters an email with special characters like `+` or `%`.

The error occurs in `src/auth/login-handler.ts` and `src/utils/validator.ts`.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open the login page
2. Enter email: `test+user@example.com`
3. Click "Sign In"
4. App crashes with TypeError

## Expected Behavior

The login should work with any valid email format including special characters.

## Actual Behavior

The app throws a `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'split')` error.

## Code

```typescript
// This is the problematic code
function validateEmail(email: string) {
  const parts = email.split('@');
  return parts[1].split('.').length >= 2;
}
```

## Environment

- TypeScript 5.3
- Node.js 20
- React 18
